page.title: AI Assistant
page.subtitle: Ask questions about your finances in natural language

chat.keyboardHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line

notConfigured.heading: AI Not Configured
notConfigured.message: No AI provider is configured. To use the AI Assistant, please {link} in your settings.

suggestedQueries.heading: Ask about your finances
suggestedQueries.description: I can answer questions about your spending, income, account balances, net worth, and more.
suggestedQueries.monthlySpendingQuery: How much did I spend last month?
suggestedQueries.topCategoriesQuery: What are my top 5 expense categories this year?
suggestedQueries.accountBalancesQuery: What are my current account balances?
suggestedQueries.compareMonthsQuery: Compare my spending this month vs last month
suggestedQueries.netWorthTrendQuery: Show my net worth trend for the last 12 months
suggestedQueries.savingsRateQuery: How much have I saved this year compared to my income?
